headline: Outdoor Living Construction Preparation Checklist — Montrose
articleBody:
Outdoor Living Construction Preparation Checklist for Montrose Clients

Before your Outdoor Living Construction appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
